displayedProducts.displayLabel: 4G MILL X-SPEED Multi Flute Multiple Helix Roughing Corner Radius End mill
displayedProducts.description:
4G MILL X-SPEED Multi Flute
Multiple Helix Roughing
Corner Radius End mill
displayedProducts.featureText:
Due to new coating and geometry, outstanding cutting ability and wear-resistance.
Excellent for cutting pre-hardened steels, carbon steels, alloy steels of molds and dies up to HRc55 and machine parts.
Available high productivity when roughing due to broken index, multiple-helix and coner radius.
Special design applied to the tool to minimize vibration so available heavy cutting and high-feed cutting.

displayedProducts.displayLabel: 4G MILL Multi Flute 20°Helix Roughing End mill
displayedProducts.description:
4G MILL Multi Flute
20°Helix Roughing End mill
displayedProducts.featureText:
Due to new coating and geometry, outstanding cutting ability and wear-resistance.
Excellent for cutting pre-hardened steels, carbon steels, alloy steels of molds and dies up to HRc55 and machine parts.
Reinfored tool's rigidity using 20° low helix angle. (Same as standard X-POWER S)
Reduced chipping by decreasing cutting force when rough milling due to applying chamfers to cutting edges.

displayedProducts.displayLabel: 4G MILL 4 Flute Multiple Helix End mill
displayedProducts.featureText:
▶Due to new coating and new tool geometry, outstanding cutting ability and wear resistance.
▶Excellent for cutting prehardened steels, carbon steels, alloy steels of molds and dies, up to HRc55 and machine parts.
▶Due to Multiple Helix for 3.0mm and over 3.0mm diameter end mills, vibration can be minimized at cutting, and wear of cutting tool can be decreased too.
- Designed equal index flute for long length end mills.
▶Due to gash land geometry used at end tooth, heavy duty cutting can be achieved.
▶Available various length products like short, regular and long length end mills etc.
